base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dr_light — a character (npc) from 1987 mega man. Dr. Light — white-beard creator NPC, 2-frame talking cycle. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
